name: Kluctl
description: Kluctl — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Kubernetes GitOps.

review.verdict: Kluctl is a CI/CD for Applications tool.
pros: Automates build, test, and deploy pipelines
cons: Compute minutes add up for large monorepos
